name: siteseed_discover
description: Discover entities and relationships from an OpenAPI spec URL. Returns an entity graph with field types, dependencies, and seed order.

openapi.description: URL or file path to OpenAPI 3.x spec (JSON or YAML)

baseUrl.description: Override base URL for API calls (inferred from spec if omitted)

name: siteseed_plan
description: Generate a seed plan from an entity graph. Returns YAML seed plan with entity order, counts, and field generators.

openapi.description: URL or file path to OpenAPI 3.x spec

count.description: Default number of entities to seed per type

name: siteseed_seed
description: Execute a seed plan — create entities via API calls in dependency order. Returns seeded entity counts and any errors.

plan.description: YAML seed plan content or file path

dryRun.description: Preview what would be seeded without executing

name: siteseed_status
description: Check the result of the last seed run.
